rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in the component type scope
Place implementation annexes in the implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the current scope
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Omit clauses involving event ports in numeric or Boolean comparisons unless data is provided
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
